name: Rotisserie Barbecued Leg of Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Insert rotisserie rod through the center of the meat and place it on the rotisserie. Cook over coals that have burned down to red and glowing ash. If using a meat thermometer, angle it so the tip is in the center of the meat but not resting in fat or on the rod, and roast until the internal temperature reaches 170°F. If you do not have a thermometer, roast for 3-1/2 to 4 hours, depending on the size of the roast.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients and brush onto the roast frequently during the last 30 minutes of cooking.
